subject: Remove dead code files and unused exports
body:
- Remove calculators/client-budget.js (never imported by active code)
- Remove ui/events.js (never imported by active code)
- Remove ui/admin.js (never imported by active code)
- Clean up config/constants.js - remove unused state and setters
- Clean up utils/index.js - remove unused reverse calculation functions
title: Remove dead code files and unused exports
